title: Phase 4 (Track A): Make backups real before anything else
summary: Ship the only Phase 4 work that's non-negotiable: nightly FalkorDB backups to off-VPS storage, a proven restore procedure, and a visible freshness indicator in the PWA. Everything else in Phase 4 (observability, /admin, dedup, polish) is in backlog.json — picked by current pain.
outOfScope: Tracks B-G (observability + /admin, dedup audit, new entity types, fallback memory layer, surface polish, deployment options) — tracked in backlog.json, picked by current pain
technicalConsiderations: Storage default: Cloudflare R2 via rclone (free egress)
New shell script compose/backup/falkordb-backup.sh on a cron / systemd timer
Freshness indicator uses a sentinel file (touched by the backup script on success, mtime read by the PWA) — no second store added
Restore procedure documented in compose/backup/RESTORE.md (a backup that does not restore is worthless)
FalkorDB is the only persistent store in Phases 1–3, so it's the only thing to back up here. Postgres is not in the stack
